title: quercus kingiana
intro: Quercus kingiana, also known as the Chinese evergreen oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to the mountainous regions of China. The bark and leaves of the Quercus kingiana have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus kingiana include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and supporting the immune system. Quercus kingiana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a powder or capsule.
